ddls:
CREATE TABLE "lottery_draws" (
  "draw_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lottery draw */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the lottery game */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the draw is held */,
  "draw_date" TEXT /* Date of the draw */,
  "prize_fund" REAL /* Total prize fund for the draw */,
  "draw_numbers" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of the drawn numbers */,
  "euro_numbers" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of the Euro Numbers (if applicable) */,
  "num_participants" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the draw */,
  "draw_status" TEXT /* Status of the draw (e.g., 'completed', 'pending') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("draw_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lottery_draws_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lottery_draws_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the lottery game */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game */,
  "num_draws_per_week" INTEGER /* Number of draws per week for the game */,
  "minimum_stake" REAL /* Minimum amount required to participate in the game */,
  "maximum_stake" REAL /* Maximum amount allowed to participate in the game */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., 'active', 'inactive') */,
  "game_rules" TEXT /* Detailed rules of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prize_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prize category */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the lottery game */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the prize category */,
  "prize_per_winner" REAL /* Prize amount per winner in the category */,
  "match_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for matching numbers (e.g., 'Match 5 and 2 Euro Numbers') */,
  "prize_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the prize fund allocated to this category */,
  "min_winners" INTEGER /* Minimum number of winners required to distribute the prize */,
  "max_winners" INTEGER /* Maximum number of winners in this category */,
  "category_status" TEXT /* Status of the category (e.g., 'active', 'inactive') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prize_categories_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "winners" (
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each winner entry */,
  "draw_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the lottery draw */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the prize category */,
  "num_winners" INTEGER /* Number of winners in this category for the draw */,
  "total_prize_amount" REAL /* Total prize amount won by the winners in this category */,
  "winning_numbers" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of the winning numbers */,
  "winning_euro_numbers" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of the winning Euro Numbers (if applicable) */,
  "claim_status" TEXT /* Status of the claim (e.g., 'claimed', 'unclaimed') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("winner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_winners_draw_id FOREIGN KEY ("draw_id") REFERENCES lottery_draws ("draw_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_winners_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES prize_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "winner_details" (
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the winner entry */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the winner */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the winner */,
  "verification_status" TEXT /* Status of winner verification */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the winner */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the winner */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the winner */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the winner */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the winner */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date when the prize was claimed */,
  "claim_location" TEXT /* Location where the prize was claimed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("winner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financials" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial transaction */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the winner entry */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., 'bank transfer', 'check') */,
  "transaction_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the transaction */,
  "audit_notes" TEXT /* Notes for audit purposes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financials_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_id") REFERENCES winner_details ("winner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "lottery_regulations" TEXT /* Regulations and laws governing the lottery in the country */,
  "lottery_operator" TEXT /* Name of the organization operating the lottery in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., 'lottery operator', 'financial analyst', 'compliance officer') */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., 'active', 'inactive') */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
